company.name_jp: 株式会社ソフトウェアプロダクツ

research_notes: Research date: 2026-06-26. Website https://www.swp-ltd.co.jp/ accessible. Founded 2008 (merger). Capital: 22.1M JPY. 26 employees. President: 清野朋春. Monitoring/control systems for water infrastructure and factories. ISO 9001:2015 certified. Privacy Mark. KIA member.
